invariants.description: FAIL-scan middleware must exist in the proxy (moved from log-tool-call.sh after the MCP decoupling -- log-tool-call.sh itself is now a stub)
Event-kernel and Stop-chain subprocess boundaries must use filesystem IPC rather than live stdin pipes, so hook portability does not depend on a specific agent CLI or Node spawn input semantics.
HME Python files must not wrap `from hme_env import ENV` (or other infrastructure imports) in try/except fallback.
invariants.context: HME Python files must not wrap `from hme_env import ENV` (or other infrastructure imports) in try/except fallback. Silent ImportError swallowed behind `os.environ.get(...)` fallback hid the synthesis_proxy_route ENV bug for weeks. Infrastructure imports must fail loud at module load time.

invariants.description: Active source must not retain stale OVERDRIVE_MODE=6 gates or helper names after mode 1 became canonical.
invariants.born_from: 2026-05-16 overdrive mode 6 retirement to canonical mode 1

invariants.description: Phase 2 (inference proxy)  hme_proxy.js must exist so ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL routing is available
hme_proxy.js must parse as valid Node so starting the daemon never fails at syntax level
Phase 2.1 jurisdiction injection must be wired in the proxy (distributed across hme_proxy.js / context.js / messages.js after the middleware refactor)
Proxy must inject open hypotheses and semantic drift warnings alongside jurisdiction context (Phase 3.1/3.3 -- moved to context.js during the middleware split)
All three wire-version components (cli/proxy/worker) must read from tools/HME/config/versions.json  not hardcoded strings. Protects the three-way version check from typo-drift.
tools/HME/config/versions.json is the single source of truth for cli/proxy/worker wire versions. Must be valid JSON with all three keys.
tools/HME/proxy/hme_proxy.js must declare PROXY_VERSION and expose GET /version.
invariants.context: tools/HME/proxy/hme_proxy.js must declare PROXY_VERSION and expose GET /version. Completes the three-way (cli/proxy/worker) version check surfaced via `hme-cli --version`  a stale proxy between a new CLI and new worker is otherwise invisible.
